case_title: ABS SEAFOOD, INC., A CORPORATION VS. AWAW, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-21-2017 CONTINUED TO AUG-02-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABS SEAFOOD, INC., A CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AWAW, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA EAST COAST ALICE $3,287.06 PRINCIPAL, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $191.70 INTEREST, $280.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,758.76, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100022713)
